The Problem

Skincare routines. Supplements.
Advice that ignores your actual biology.

❌

Generic recommendations

One-size-fits-all advice ignores your specific hormonal profile, gut microbiome, and genetic expression.

❌

Symptom masking

Most products treat symptoms without addressing root causes — bloating, dull skin, and low energy keep returning.

❌

Trend-driven, not evidence-driven

Social media optimization is marketing. Actual physiological improvement requires understanding mechanisms.

The Process

How SciMax Works

A systematic approach to physiological optimization. No guessing.

01

Take the Diagnostic

Answer 25+ targeted questions across 6 physiological categories. No fluff — every question maps to a mechanism.

02

AI Analyzes Your Biology

Our model cross-references your answers against peer-reviewed research to identify your root causes.

03

Get Your Protocol

Receive a daily action plan built specifically for your physiology. Morning, afternoon, evening — fully structured.

6 Systems

What We Analyze

Most optimization programs touch 1–2 variables. We map the full system.

🧬

Facial Appearance

Skin, structure, bloating, jawline definition

⚡

Hormones

Energy, testosterone, cortisol, thyroid markers

🌙

Sleep & Recovery

Circadian rhythm, deep sleep, cellular repair

🌿

Nutrition & Gut

Diet quality, gut-skin axis, inflammation

🦴

Posture & Mechanics

Spinal alignment, breathing, structural health

🧠

Stress & Nervous System

HPA axis, cortisol cycles, ANS regulation

The Science

Built on mechanisms,
not marketing

Every recommendation in your protocol traces back to a specific physiological mechanism — cortisol cycles, mTOR signaling, the gut-skin axis, HPA dysfunction, lymphatic drainage, and more.

We translate research from endocrinology, dermatology, sleep science, and nutritional biochemistry into daily actions you can actually implement.

Cortisol & HPA Axis
Stress → hormonal cascade → appearance
Gut-Skin Axis
Microbiome health → systemic inflammation → skin
Growth Hormone Pulsatility
Sleep architecture → cellular repair → collagen
mTOR & Protein Synthesis
Nutrition timing → muscle retention → structure
Lymphatic Function
Movement & sleep position → facial drainage
Circadian Biology
Light exposure → melatonin → every downstream process

Real Results, Real Biology

When you fix root causes, the results speak for themselves.
